title: Constant function call in generate loop causes assert

features.name: constant function call directly in generate for loop bound
features.description: Code should include a generate for loop whose upper-bound condition is a direct call to a user-defined constant function, rather than a pre-computed parameter

features.name: user-defined integer constant function with while loop
features.description: Code should include a user-defined integer function that computes a value using a while loop and bit-shift, callable at elaboration time as a constant function

features.name: wire width determined by constant function call
features.description: Code should include a wire whose bit-width is computed by a direct call to a user-defined constant function in the port/net declaration

features.name: indexed part-select as argument to constant function
features.description: Code should include an indexed part-select expression (array[(const_expr)+:width]) used as an argument to a constant function call at elaboration time

features.name: generate assign inside for loop using constant function in bit-select
features.description: Code should include a generate for loop body with a continuous assign statement that uses a constant function call in the part-select range expression
